---
name: RFC (Protocol Change)
about: Propose a change to the OBP protocol specification
title: '[RFC] '
labels: RFC, protocol
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One paragraph summary of the proposed protocol change.

## Motivation

Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve?

## Detailed Design

Describe the change in detail. Include:
- New or modified entities/fields
- New or modified API endpoints
- New or modified federation behavior
- Migration path from current behavior

## Example

```json
// Example request/response showing the new behavior
```

## Drawbacks

Any potential downsides or complexities introduced.

## Alternatives

What other approaches were considered and why were they rejected?

## Unresolved Questions

List any open questions that need to be resolved before this RFC can be accepted.

---

**RFC Status:** Draft | Under Discussion | Accepted | Rejected | Implemented
**Breaking Change:** Yes / No
**Target Version:** v1.x / v2.0
